global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a meal selection interface and promotional text.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid blue background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a vibrant backdrop for the text.

elements.label: Meal selection interface
elements.description: A visual representation of a meal selection interface with three rectangular placeholders for food items.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: A circular icon representing a food item, placed in the center of the ad.

elements.description: Another circular icon representing a different food item, also centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: A third circular icon representing yet another food item, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Small food icon
elements.description: Another small circular food icon, positioned slightly below the center.

elements.label: Small food icon
elements.description: A third small circular food icon, located towards the right side of the ad.

elements.label: Body text area
elements.description: A rectangular area at the bottom center containing text that describes the offer.

elements.label: Body text area
elements.description: Another rectangular area for body text, positioned slightly to the left of the bottom center.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline text in white, stating 'Hungry? We got you' against a blue background.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' displayed in a bold font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top right corner with the text 'SALE' in white on a blue background.
